specs.title: GET /api/health returns 200
health check includes timestamp
GET /api/posts returns posts list

POST /api/posts requires authentication
GET /api/tags returns tags list
GET /api/search requires query parameter

GET /api/public/users returns public user list

returns 404 for non-existent API routes
handles malformed JSON gracefully

onboarding modal can be dismissed

research lab sections: polls accessibility
research lab sections: surveys accessibility
research lab sections: statistics accessibility
research lab sections: search accessibility
dark mode preference is respected
offline page displays premium design (glows and animations)
login and signup forms have correct structure
editor page requires authentication
authenticated user can access editor and create a post
